name: Spiced Pot Roast
recipeInstructions: This is the roast with soul!! Place the crushed red pepper, garlic, cumin, mustard, turmeric, ginger, rosemary, lemon pulp, sugar, salt (or Beau Monde), poppy seeds, and vinegar in a blender. Blend for about 30 seconds. Put the beef roast in a large bowl and pour the blended herbs and spices over the meat; let marinate for at least 6 hours in the refrigerator (covered). Heat oil in a skillet; add cloves and bay leaves and fry them for about 4 minutes. Add onions and fry until soft. Turn off heat and let the oil become lukewarm. Add the meat and simmer for about an hour. Pour on tomato puree and increase heat; cook until the meat is tender. This is a great recipe to mix together (everything) and pour over a roast in the crock pot; let cook for about 6-8 hours on LOW. Enjoy!!
